ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program to which the course belongs */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who created the course */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to support course versioning */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of prerequisite courses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was last updated */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the program */,
  "program_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_head_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clo" (
  "clo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CLO */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the CLO belongs to */,
  "clo_description" TEXT /* Description of the CLO */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the CLO (e.g., Cognitive, Psychomotor) */,
  "taxonomy_level" INTEGER /* Taxonomic level of the CLO */,
  "plo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Program Learning Outcome (PLO) the CLO aligns with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CLO was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CLO was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the CLO */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the CLO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clo_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clo_plo_id FOREIGN KEY ("plo_id") REFERENCES plo ("plo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clo_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clo_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plo" (
  "plo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PLO */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the PLO belongs to */,
  "plo_description" TEXT /* Description of the PLO */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PLO was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PLO was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the PLO */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the PLO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plo_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plo_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plo_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score for the assessment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the assessment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the assessment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Exam, Project, Quiz) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_clo" (
  "assessment_clo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment-CLO relationship */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "clo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CLO */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the CLO in the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_clo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_clo_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_clo_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_clo_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_clo_clo_id FOREIGN KEY ("clo_id") REFERENCES clo ("clo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the student record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the student record */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessment" (
  "student_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-assessment result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the result */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., Submitted, Graded, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Instructor, Student, Administrator, Curriculum Developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., Video, PDF, Lab Manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the resource */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the resource belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
